prestazioni: Engine: Naturally aspirated 2.0L Skyactiv-G (PY-VPS) with forged internals including Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 9,000 RPM reliably. Paired with a Tomei 272°/276° camshaft set (intake/exhaust) and Supertech valve springs/retainers for aggressive valvetrain stability.

Forced Induction: Garrett GTX2860R Gen II turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller. Intercooled via a PWR 4.5-inch core front-mount intercooler with custom piping by Cusco Japan, supporting 22 psi of boost on E85 fuel.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD with 2.15 final drive ratio, paired with a PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset (1st: 2.97, 2nd: 2.15, 3rd: 1.63, 4th: 1.26, 5th: 1.00, 6th: 0.84). Clutch Masters FX500 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for 500+ ft-lb torque capacity. Custom driveshaft by Driveshaft Shop with 3.5-inch chromoly tubing and CV joints.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (MX-5 ND-specific) with carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler. Custom front splitter by Seibon Carbon with integrated air curtains and a 3D-printed NACA duct for brake cooling. Rear diffuser by Varis Japan with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5-inch titanium tips (Burns Stainless).

Suspension: Öhlins DFV Road & Track coilovers (ND-specific valving) with 25mm front and 20mm rear adjustable camber plates (SPL Parts). Cusco front and rear sway bars (23mm front, 19mm rear) with spherical end links. Polyurethane bushings by Energy Suspension (full set) and spherical bearing subframe collars by Hardrace.

Interior/Exterior: Recaro SP-G (ND-specific) seats with custom Alcantara/leather upholstery by Status Racing. Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm) with NRG quick-release hub. Full roll cage by Custom Cages UK (FIA-spec, bolt-in) with integrated harness bar. Exterior: 3M Matte Pearl White wrap with Racing Beat front lip and rear bumper diffuser in gloss black. Enkei PF07 wheels (17x9 +35 front, 17x10 +40 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear).
